markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Finhabits and GrowthX for scaling content production and reducing paid media dependence.](https://fathom.video/share/c2fpCqgPbbeR6qnxzGbzVr9sft9zxKZH?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Finhabits seeks to scale content production beyond CEO Carlos' current output, aiming to reduce paid media reliance](https://fathom.video/share/c2fpCqgPbbeR6qnxzGbzVr9sft9zxKZH?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation services, blending human expertise with automation for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/c2fpCqgPbbeR6qnxzGbzVr9sft9zxKZH?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [GrowthX's approach involves a 6-8 week strategy sprint ($20K) followed by a 12-month engagement, focusing on editorial content and distribution](https://fathom.video/share/c2fpCqgPbbeR6qnxzGbzVr9sft9zxKZH?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)
  - [Finhabits is in transition, hiring a part-time content strategist, but sees potential in GrowthX for significant scaling](https://fathom.video/share/c2fpCqgPbbeR6qnxzGbzVr9sft9zxKZH?tab=summary&timestamp=1751.0)

## Topics

### Finhabits Overview

  - [Founded in 2017, catering to Hispanic audience in the US](https://fathom.video/share/c2fpCqgPbbeR6qnxzGbzVr9sft9zxKZH?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Offers financial education, investment tools, and insurance products](https://fathom.video/share/c2fpCqgPbbeR6qnxzGbzVr9sft9zxKZH?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [$10/month subscription model for wealth product, including AI financial planner](https://fathom.video/share/c2fpCqgPbbeR6qnxzGbzVr9sft9zxKZH?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [Conversion goals: paid memberships (wealth) and quote clicks (insurance)](https://fathom.video/share/c2fpCqgPbbeR6qnxzGbzVr9sft9zxKZH?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)

### Current Content Strategy Challenges

  - [Heavy reliance on CEO Carlos for daily content creation](https://fathom.video/share/c2fpCqgPbbeR6qnxzGbzVr9sft9zxKZH?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [Limited scalability due to dependence on one person](https://fathom.video/share/c2fpCqgPbbeR6qnxzGbzVr9sft9zxKZH?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [Recent SEO-focused approach increased traffic but not conversions](https://fathom.video/share/c2fpCqgPbbeR6qnxzGbzVr9sft9zxKZH?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [Seeking to expand content reach while maintaining quality and driving business growth](https://fathom.video/share/c2fpCqgPbbeR6qnxzGbzVr9sft9zxKZH?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)

### GrowthX's Approach and Services

  - [Utilizes AI + human expertise to accelerate content production](https://fathom.video/share/c2fpCqgPbbeR6qnxzGbzVr9sft9zxKZH?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [Focuses on repurposing video content across multiple channels](https://fathom.video/share/c2fpCqgPbbeR6qnxzGbzVr9sft9zxKZH?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [Emphasizes strategic foundation before scaling content](https://fathom.video/share/c2fpCqgPbbeR6qnxzGbzVr9sft9zxKZH?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
  - [Offers 6-8 week strategy sprint followed by 12-month engagement](https://fathom.video/share/c2fpCqgPbbeR6qnxzGbzVr9sft9zxKZH?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)
  - [Adapts to various client sizes and team structures](https://fathom.video/share/c2fpCqgPbbeR6qnxzGbzVr9sft9zxKZH?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)

### Potential Collaboration Structure

  - [GrowthX typically works with Series A/B companies](https://fathom.video/share/c2fpCqgPbbeR6qnxzGbzVr9sft9zxKZH?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)
  - [Flexible in working with different team sizes and structures](https://fathom.video/share/c2fpCqgPbbeR6qnxzGbzVr9sft9zxKZH?tab=summary&timestamp=1974.0)
  - [Requires client feedback and collaboration, especially in early stages](https://fathom.video/share/c2fpCqgPbbeR6qnxzGbzVr9sft9zxKZH?tab=summary&timestamp=1994.0)
  - [Can potentially integrate with existing marketing and content teams](https://fathom.video/share/c2fpCqgPbbeR6qnxzGbzVr9sft9zxKZH?tab=summary&timestamp=2085.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to share Statement of Work (SoW) detailing engagement structure](https://fathom.video/share/c2fpCqgPbbeR6qnxzGbzVr9sft9zxKZH?tab=summary&timestamp=2168.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting to review SoW, platform demo, and deliverable examples](https://fathom.video/share/c2fpCqgPbbeR6qnxzGbzVr9sft9zxKZH?tab=summary&timestamp=2177.0)
  - [Explore video content opportunities relevant to Finhabits](https://fathom.video/share/c2fpCqgPbbeR6qnxzGbzVr9sft9zxKZH?tab=summary&timestamp=2190.0)
  - [Finhabits to consider how GrowthX's services align with their new content strategist and team structure](https://fathom.video/share/c2fpCqgPbbeR6qnxzGbzVr9sft9zxKZH?tab=summary&timestamp=2204.0)
